name: Name Cleanup Tests and Final Sweep
outcome_goal: All test classes/functions renamed from Dag/dag to Praxis/praxis. Full codebase sweep confirms zero remaining DAG branding.

jobs.label: rename_test_classes
jobs.description: Rename 10 TestDag* classes to TestPraxis* in MCP integration tests
jobs.prompt:
In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_mcp_workflow_server.py`, rename all test classes that use the 'Dag' prefix:

- TestDagValidate (line 661) -> TestPraxisValidate
- TestDagStatus (line 701) -> TestPraxisStatus
- TestDagMaintenance (line 731) -> TestPraxisMaintenance
- TestDagQuery (line 742) -> TestPraxisQuery
- TestDagBugs (line 777) -> TestPraxisBugs
- TestDagHealth (line 1000) -> TestPraxisHealth
- TestDagOperatorView (line 1018) -> TestPraxisOperatorView
- TestDagRecall (line 1027) -> TestPraxisRecall
- TestDagIngest (line 1038) -> TestPraxisIngest
- TestDagDispatchDryRun (line 1091) -> TestPraxisDispatchDryRun

Also update any internal strings that reference these class names (e.g. error messages like 'TestDagBugs unexpectedly touched live Postgres').

Do NOT change any test logic, assertions, or fixture usage — only rename the classes and update their string references.

jobs.label: rename_test_funcs
jobs.description: Rename test_tool_dag_* and test_dag_* functions in unit tests
jobs.outcome_goal: No test_tool_dag or test_dag function names remain
jobs.prompt:
Rename test functions in these files:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_mcp_session_tools.py`:
   - Line 10: `test_tool_dag_decompose_returns_estimate_and_files` -> `test_tool_praxis_decompose_returns_estimate_and_files`
   - Line 50: `test_tool_dag_heartbeat_status_returns_summary` -> `test_tool_praxis_heartbeat_status_returns_summary`
   - Line 69: `test_tool_dag_heartbeat_status_with_errors` -> `test_tool_praxis_heartbeat_status_with_errors`

2. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_mcp_health_tool.py`:
   - Line 45: `test_tool_dag_health_uses_workflow_database_env` -> `test_tool_praxis_health_uses_workflow_database_env`

3. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_runtime_context_tool.py`:
   - Line 8: `test_dag_context_shard_summary_reads_current_workflow_session` -> `test_praxis_context_shard_summary_reads_current_workflow_session`

Do NOT change any test logic or assertions — only rename the functions.

jobs.label: rename_test_data
jobs.description: Rename dag-project/dag-dispatch string literals in test files
jobs.outcome_goal: No dag-project or dag-dispatch string literals in tests
jobs.prompt:
Update string literal references in test files:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_startup_wiring.py`:
   - Find and replace `'dag-dispatch'` with `'praxis-dispatch'`
   - Find and replace `'dag-project'` with `'praxis-project'`
   - Also update `'DAG Dispatch'` to `'Praxis Dispatch'` if it appears

2. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_native_authority.py`:
   - Find and replace `'dag-project'` with `'praxis-project'`

3. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_instance_isolation.py`:
   - Find and replace `'dag-project'` with `'praxis-project'`

Do NOT change test logic — only update the string values to match the new naming.

jobs.label: rename_existing_spec
jobs.description: Rename dag references in existing W_moon_dag_polish spec
jobs.outcome_goal: Existing spec uses graph naming instead of dag
jobs.prompt:
Update the existing workflow spec `config/cascade/specs/W_moon_dag_polish_20260413.json`:

1. Change `"name": "Moon DAG Canvas Polish"` to `"name": "Moon Graph Canvas Polish"`
2. Change job slug `"dag_css"` to `"graph_css"`
3. Change job slug `"wire_dag_classes"` to `"wire_graph_classes"`
4. Update `depends_on` references: `"dag_css"` -> `"graph_css"`
5. In all prompt text, replace 'DAG' with 'graph' when referring to the canvas/nodes:
   - 'DAG canvas nodes' -> 'graph canvas nodes'
   - 'DAG view' -> 'graph view'
   - 'DAG Canvas' -> 'Graph Canvas'
   - 'DAG nodes' -> 'graph nodes'
6. Update verify_command references from 'moon-dag-node' to 'moon-graph-node' and 'moon-dag-append' to 'moon-graph-append'
7. In the prompt text, update CSS class names from moon-dag-* to moon-graph-*

jobs.label: import_type_sweep
jobs.description: Full Python import check + TypeScript tsc --noEmit sweep
jobs.outcome_goal: All renamed imports resolve correctly, TypeScript compiles clean
jobs.prompt:
Run comprehensive import and type checks to catch any broken references from the name cleanup:

1. Python imports — verify these work:
   ```
   cd Code&DBs/Workflow
   python3 -c 'from runtime.instance import NativeWorkflowInstance; print("instance OK")'
   python3 -c 'from surfaces.api.frontdoor import NativeWorkflowFrontdoor; print("frontdoor OK")'
   python3 -c 'from registry.integration_registry_sync import _STATIC_INTEGRATIONS; print("registry OK")'
   ```

2. TypeScript types — verify:
   ```
   cd Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app
   npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20
   ```

3. If any imports fail or types error, read the failing file and fix the broken reference.

4. Also grep for any stale imports that still reference old names:
   ```
   grep -rn 'NativeDagInstance\|NativeDagFrontdoor\|DagLayout\|RunDAG' Code&DBs/Workflow/ --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v node_modules
   ```
   Fix any hits found.
jobs.verify_command: cd Code\&DBs/Workflow && python3 -c 'from runtime.instance import NativeWorkflowInstance; from surfaces.api.frontdoor import NativeWorkflowFrontdoor; print("OK")'

jobs.label: final_grep
jobs.description: Final comprehensive grep for any remaining DAG/Dag references
jobs.outcome_goal: Zero remaining DAG branding in codebase (excluding legitimate cascade terms)
jobs.prompt:
Run a final comprehensive grep sweep across the entire Praxis codebase:

```
grep -rn 'NativeDagInstance\|NativeDagFrontdoor\|X-DAG-\|"dag-dispatch"\|"dag-project"\|dag_research\|DagLayout\|RunDAG\|dag-app\|dag-api\|dag-ui\|TestDag\|test_tool_dag_\|test_dag_context\|DAG Dispatch\|DAG Workflow\|Dag Project\|DAG REST\|DAG MCP\|DAG node\|native DAG\|DAG operations\|DAG instance\|DAG dispatch\|DAG runtime\|DAG execution\|DAG autonomous\|DAG-APITask\|dag-workflow-github' Code&DBs/Workflow/ config/ --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.css' --include='*.json' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v '.pyc' | grep -v cascade_inactive | grep -v _mine_failure
```

If ANY hits are found, fix them by applying the standard rename mapping:
- Class names: NativeDag* -> NativeWorkflow*
- Interfaces: DagLayout -> GraphLayout, RunDAG -> RunGraph
- CSS: moon-dag -> moon-graph, run-dag -> run-graph
- Strings: dag-dispatch -> praxis-dispatch, dag-project -> praxis-project
- Docstrings: DAG -> Praxis Engine / workflow as appropriate
- Test names: TestDag* -> TestPraxis*, test_dag_* -> test_praxis_*

Report the final count of remaining references (should be 0).
jobs.verify_command: ! grep -rn 'NativeDagInstance\|NativeDagFrontdoor\|X-DAG-\|"dag-dispatch"\|"dag-project"\|DagLayout\|RunDAG\|dag-app\|TestDag\|test_tool_dag_' Code\&DBs/Workflow/ config/ --include='*.py' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.css' --include='*.json' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v __pycache__
